h1.visual_description: Bold, centered, sans-serif or slab-serif font, significantly larger than body text, used for chart or section titles.

h2.visual_description: Italicized label followed by a colon and standard serif body text, used for figure captions.
h2.example_text: Figure 12.8: Top tuna fishing nations based on landings of seven tuna species in 2018.

visual_matchers.semantic_meaning: Page footer containing page number and publication title

layout_info.margin_noise_patterns: Footer text at the bottom of the page consisting of a page number, a vertical pipe, and the book title 'Conserving Tuna: The Most Commercially Valuable Fish on Earth'.
